title: Mika's Brave Night Light
synopsis: When Mika's night light goes out during a thunderstorm, she feels scared in the dark. With help from her stuffed elephant Kesi and her caring family, she discovers her own inner braveness and finds a way to feel safe and happy again.

pages.text: Mika loved her cozy bedroom. Her soft yellow night light made everything feel safe and warm. She hugged her stuffed elephant Kesi tight as Mama tucked her into bed.

illustration.description: A young Black girl with curly hair in purple pajamas sits in a colorful bedroom, hugging a gray stuffed elephant. A gentle yellow night light glows on the nightstand. Her South Asian mother with long dark hair in a blue robe leans over to tuck her in. The room has bright blue walls with star stickers and a rainbow rug.
illustration.alt: Mika in bed being tucked in by her mama

pages.text: CRACK! Thunder rumbled outside. The lights flickered and went out. Mika's room became very dark. She felt scared and started to cry. 'Mama!' she called.

illustration.description: The same bedroom now completely dark except for brief lightning flashes through the window. Mika sits up in bed looking frightened, holding Kesi close. Rain streaks down the window pane. Dark purple and blue tones dominate the scene with dramatic white lightning streaks.
illustration.alt: Mika looking scared in her dark room during the storm

pages.text: Mama came quickly with a flashlight. 'I'm scared of the dark,' Mika whispered. Papa appeared too, holding his phone light. 'It's okay to feel scared,' Papa said gently.

illustration.description: Mika's parents stand by her bed holding lights - Mama with a yellow flashlight and Papa (a tall Black man with glasses and a green t-shirt) with a phone light. Mika sits in bed looking sad but relieved. The warm lights create golden circles in the dark room.
illustration.alt: Mika's parents comforting her with flashlights

pages.text: Big sister Anya peeked in. 'When I feel scared, I think of brave things,' she said. 'Like elephants! They're big and strong.' Mika looked at Kesi and smiled a little.

illustration.description: A teenage girl with natural curly hair in a pink hoodie stands in the doorway. Mika holds up her gray elephant, looking thoughtful. The family gathers around the bed in the soft glow of their lights, creating a warm, safe feeling.
illustration.alt: Big sister Anya talking about being brave while Mika holds her elephant

pages.text: Papa found battery candles that glowed softly. 'These will keep you safe until morning,' he said. Mika felt better watching the gentle light dance on her walls.

illustration.description: Three small LED candles sit on Mika's nightstand and dresser, casting a warm amber glow. Papa arranges them while Mika watches happily from bed. The room feels cozy and magical with the soft candlelight creating dancing shadows on the colorful walls.
illustration.alt: Papa setting up battery candles while Mika watches

pages.text: Mika hugged Kesi close. 'I'm brave like an elephant,' she whispered. The storm seemed quieter now. She felt safe and happy. Soon she drifted off to peaceful sleep.

illustration.description: Mika sleeps peacefully in her bed, smiling softly while cuddling Kesi. The battery candles glow warmly around the room. Outside the window, the storm has calmed and gentle stars peek through the clearing clouds. Everything feels safe and serene.
illustration.alt: Mika sleeping peacefully with her elephant and candles glowing

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Mika feel when the lights went out?
questions.explanation: Mika felt scared when her room became dark during the storm.

questions.question: What animal is Kesi?
questions.explanation: Kesi is Mika's stuffed elephant that helps her feel brave.

questions.question: Who helped Mika feel better?
questions.explanation: Mama, Papa, and big sister Anya all helped Mika feel safe and brave.

questions.question: How did Mika feel at the end?
questions.explanation: Mika felt happy and safe when she realized she could be brave like an elephant.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.text: Mika loved her cozy _____. When the storm came, she felt _____. Her family helped her feel _____ again.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: Kesi is Mika's stuffed _____. Papa brought _____ to make light. Mika felt _____ like an elephant.
